Questions.Q1: Can you describe exactly what happened during the incident?
Questions.Q2: When did the incident occur (date and time)?
Questions.Q4: What were you doing immediately before the incident happened?
Questions.Q5: Who was involved in the incident?
Questions.Q6: Were you drunk while driving?  yes, what was your blood alcIfohol concentration (BAC) at the time of the incident?
Questions.Q7: Was anyone injured? If yes, what injuries were sustained?
Questions.Q8: Did you seek medical treatment? If yes, where and when?
Questions.Q9: Was the incident reported to the police or any authority?
Questions.Q10: Do you have any supporting evidence such as photos, videos,```` or documents?
Questions.Q11: What property or vehicle was damaged?
Questions.Q12: Can you describe the extent of the damage?
Questions.Q13: Have you obtained any repair estimates or invoices?
Questions.Q14: Have you made any previous claims related to this asset or a similar incident?
Questions.Q15: Is there any additional information that may help us assess this claim?
